CavernIntro_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "699481FE4BC71AF336DDE8AA1BF72E33", "You've now entered the <Important>Caverns</> of <Important>Meridian</>!

While the <Important>Surface</> is safe, here you are at risk from various hazards, so be careful.

You can come and go via this <Important>Cave Entrance</> at any time - it is marked on your <Important>Compass</> just like the entrance on the <Important>Surface</>.

While <Important>Underground</> you will need to manage two resources - <Health>Health</> and <Air>Air</>.

These are shown in the lower left corner of the screen.")

CavernIntro_2.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "09568C22429C879D6FA83399B9C4D7C4", "Here, right at the exit to the <Important>Surface</>, your <Air>Air Supply</> will recharge.
As you descend deeper into the <Important>Caverns</>, your <Air>Air Supply</> will gradually <Important>decrease</>.

Reaching a level of zero will cause your <Health>Health</> to start degrading.

Your <Air>Air Supply</> level is displayed in <Air>blue</> at the lower left corner of the screen by the 02 icon.

The lights on Maeve's suit will change colour depending on your air supply state - <Yellow>yellow</> for decreasing, <Green>green</> for increasing or steady.

In your exploration you may also <Important>discover areas or craft items</> which can <Important>refill</> your <Air>Air Supply</>, so keep an eye out!

Make sure to return to the <Important>Surface</> or air-supplied areas frequently to refill!")

CavernIntro_3.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "B3EDFD494013DB2C1F67AB9B05357B85", "Your <Health>Health</> is displayed at the bottom left of the screen, in <Health>red</> by the heart icon.
It will gradually regenerate over time if you are hurt, as long as you have a stable <Air>Air Supply</>.

If your <Health>Health</> reaches zero you will <Important>collapse</> and be returned to safety on the <Important>Surface</>, but <Important>drop all of your carried items</>.

<Important>If you can return to the same location, you can retrieve these items.</>


As you explore, remember you can use your suit's Scan ability <Cyan>(X)</> to highlight interactable objects and resources within the environment.")
